name: AEON Biopharma Inc. Class A Common Stock
summary: AEON Biopharma Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing botulinum toxin serotype E (BoNT/E) neurotoxin products for debilitating medical conditions. The company's lead product candidate, ABP-450, is being developed for the treatment of cervical dystonia and other neurological disorders. AEON Biopharma is headquartered in Newport Beach, California.
